plugins.name: golden-rules
plugins.description: Installs mandatory security, coding, naming, and design standards into CLAUDE.md as always-on context for every Claude Code session.

plugins.name: agent-based-development
plugins.description: Full async multi-agent development workflow: Planning → Design → Dev → Security/Tech Review loop with file-based handoffs and release-branch Git model.

plugins.name: mvp-readiness
plugins.description: Runs a structured MVP quality-gate audit covering stability, security, logging, docs, and implementation integrity. Reports pass/fail with evidence.

plugins.name: security-review
plugins.description: Structured security audit covering injection, auth, secrets, input validation, dependencies, and cryptography. Produces severity-graded findings.

plugins.name: git-workflow
plugins.description: Enforces the release-branch Git model: scaffold feature branches, open PRs with review checks, cut releases with tags, and view workflow reference.

plugins.name: example-skill
plugins.description: A sample skill that greets the user and summarizes the current project

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Structured engineering code review covering readability, complexity, test gaps, SOLID principles, and API consistency.

plugins.name: test-writer
plugins.description: Generates comprehensive unit and integration tests for a given file or function, auto-detecting the project test framework and matching existing test style.

plugins.name: dependency-audit
plugins.description: Audits project dependencies for unpinned versions, deprecated packages, missing lockfiles, and known CVEs.

plugins.name: changelog-generator
plugins.description: Generates a structured CHANGELOG.md following Keep a Changelog format from git history and ABD handoff artifacts.

plugins.name: onboarding
plugins.description: Generates a comprehensive developer onboarding guide by reading the codebase: directory map, entry points, environment variables, key commands, and architecture overview.

plugins.name: requirements-generator
plugins.description: Generates structured requirements documents with functional requirements, non-functional requirements, Gherkin acceptance criteria, edge cases, and out-of-scope items.

plugins.name: log-correlation
plugins.description: Correlates and troubleshoots logs across OS, AWS (CloudWatch, CloudTrail, ALB, Lambda), application, and web server sources. Extensible via log-types/ definitions.

plugins.name: incident-report
plugins.description: Generates professional incident reports using customizable templates and rules. Supports outage, security, performance, and data-loss types. Extensible via templates/ and rules/.

plugins.name: pre-commit
plugins.description: Fast pre-commit quality gate: secrets, dead code, naming, conflict markers, and direct-to-main protection. Installs as a git hook.

plugins.name: best-practices
plugins.description: Holistic codebase audit that auto-detects the stack and produces a prioritized improvement roadmap with level-of-effort estimates.

plugins.name: architecture-design
plugins.description: Guides the design of a new system or major feature from requirements to a documented architecture: C4 model diagrams, service boundaries, API contracts, data design, failure modes, and cross-cutting concerns.

plugins.name: architecture-review
plugins.description: Audits an existing system's architecture for structural anti-patterns, scalability and reliability risks, and testability gaps. Produces graded findings with migration paths and a to-be architecture diagram.

plugins.name: adr
plugins.description: Creates and maintains Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) in docs/decisions/ using the MADR format. Supports creating, listing, updating, superseding, and searching ADRs.

plugins.name: api-design
plugins.description: Designs and reviews REST, GraphQL, and gRPC APIs. Design mode produces OpenAPI specs, GraphQL schemas, or proto files. Review mode audits existing APIs for consistency, best practices, and breaking change risks.

plugins.name: database-design
plugins.description: Designs database schemas from domain requirements (ERD, indexes, migrations, security) or reviews existing schemas for normalization issues, missing indexes, unsafe migrations, and scalability risks.

plugins.name: accessibility
plugins.description: Audits code for WCAG 2.2 AA compliance (review mode) and provides design guidance for building accessible components (design mode). Covers semantic HTML, ARIA, keyboard navigation, colour contrast, focus management, and motion.
